titleStmt.title: SII 15.111: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 111. (B.K. No. 103 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab on the proper left side of the Mallikārjuna temple.

This is dated the cyclic year Pārthiva, Āshāḍha, ba. 9, Wednesday, Dakshiṇāyanasaṅkrānti. The date is irregular. In Pārthiva corresponding to 1165 A.D., the given tithi fell on July 4, Sunday. But the said Saṅkrānti occurred on June 26.

The epigraph describes the king as having secured the kingdom by the prowess of his arms and praises the Three Hundred learned Mahājanas of the agrahāra of Muttage which was included in the province of Taddavāḍi Thousand. It records the gift of lands and a garden to the god Dakshiṇāmukha-Chennakēśava by Chauṇḍiseṭṭi, Nāchiseṭṭi and Mādiseṭṭi, the sons of Kaihiseṭṭi of the Śvētakula, who is said to have erected a temple in honour of the deity at Muttage. Several other gifts to the god consisting of income from Baṇṇigedeṟe, tax on house-sites, etc., were made by the local officials and citizens. The management of the benefactions was entrusted into the hands of the Mahājanas. The descriptive portion of the record contains a few Sanskrit verses.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyādilasanmū¨rttiḥ kēśavaḥ kēśavajribhiḥ vaṁditō maditōdvritta ditijōṭhiti jōtkaraṁ . śrīvistṛta dī¨rgghāyu
vanī viṣṇusthāna dha¨rmmamaṁ rakṣipa prithvīvallabhaṁge kuḍugamarāvaḷiyaṁ kāvaceṁ
nakēśavadēvaṁ . jayavaṁ kēśavanātmarakṣeya nibhāsyaṁ kāntiyaṁ ṣaṇmukhaṁ priyavaṁ bra
hmanabhīṣṭavaṁ saresati śrīyaṁ mahālakṣmi ni¨rbbhayavaṁ du¨rgge sukī¨rttiyaṁ girije dī¨rghā
yuṣyavaṁ pā¨rvatīdayitaṁ mā¨rṇnade cauḍiseṭṭige kuḍutti¨rkkāgaḷuṁ prītiyiṁ . kaṁ . śrīyaṁ nandanaraṁ dī¨rghāyu
vanī mādiseṭṭigeṁduṁ kuḍugī tōyaja suśaṁkhacakragadāyudhavaṁ piḍiva caṁnakēśava dēvaṁ . kaṁ .
muttina muttina taḍiviḍiduttamada va¨rṇnada¨rṇnaḥ pū¨rṇnaṁ stutippudu nadiyoḷa berasuttippadu ratnamudra
lavaṇasamudraṁ . kaṁ . lavaṇasamudraṁ suttippavanītaḷavella veyda jaṁbūdvīpaṁ navava¨rṣaṁ gaLinesevudu divijāśrayavalli naḍuve maṁdaravikkuṁ . kaṁ . vasudhārā
yutadādiya vasudhārāyuta samasta madhyada bahudēva sudhārājita śikharada vasudhārāji taruviṁde maṁdaravesaguṁ . ka . Ā maṁdaradiṁ teṁkaṇa haimādriya vārinidhiya
paḍuvaṇa bharatō¨rvvīmadhyadoḷippudu sugrāmastōmāvakāśa kuṁtaḷadēśaṁ . ka . śrīmajjanadiṁdesavudu kōmaḷa tiḷakānta ka¨rṇnikāramaṇiyaṁ śyāmaḷa mṛdulapanamitaṁ strīmukha kuṁtaḷadavolviṣa
yaṁ kuṁtaḷamuṁ . kaṁ . kuṁtaḷadēśakkarasādaṁ tōḷvaladiṁde bijjalakṣitipasutaṁ kāṁtā kāraṁ kaḷacurisaṁtānaṁ sōvidēvanesava grīvaṁ . kaṁ . dānavaśāsanaveṁduṁ
mānavapati śauri sadvipārōhakanuṁ tānāgi sōvidēvaṁ śrīnāthanavolmurārivesaraṁ paḍedaṁ . vri . karavāḷa sthiradhārayiṁdaviṟivaṁ vīrāri bhūbhṛcchiraḥkaravāḷa praca
yaṁgaḷeyde haṟidu¨rbbīraṁgadoḷu biḷdavuṁ karavāḷalu raṇaraṁgadalli neravaṁ saṁtrāsadiṁ deṁnaraṁ karavāḷallanadeṁduvaṁte subhaṭaṁ śrī sōmabhūmīśvaraṁ . v® . līleyi
nājiraṁgadoḷ kāduva rāyamurāri sōmabhūpāḷana khaḍgadhāregaḷoḷa¨rggidarāti dharātaḷādhipa¨rbbālavayōpsarōcaḷa kucēṣṭa nivāsadoḷi¨rpparōḍida
¨rbbālavayōpsarōcaḷa kucēṣṭa nivāsadoḷi¨rpparadbhutaṁ . kaṁ . sōmanṛpālaṁ rakṣipa bhūmiya madhyapradēśadalli samastōgrāmaṁgaḷavillada sugrāmaṁgaḷa taddavāḍinā
ḍesedikkuṁ . kaṁ . sale dhanadhānya janaṁgaḷineḷagoppuva taddavāḍi nāḍoḷagaṇa niścalita sahasragrāmaṁgaḷoḷellaṁ susthavāgi muttageyesaguṁ . v® . negaḷdā nālkumukhaṁ
gaḷiṁ kamalajaṁ muṁnōdidōdallavaṁ bagedoṁdoṁdu mukhaṁgaḷiṁ sakalalōkaṁ mecceniccaṁ pratijñegaḷiṁdōduvareṁdaruttama catu¨rvvēdaṁgaḷoḷbrahmaniṁ migilappa
prabhumukhya muttageya mūnū¨rbba¨rssamastō¨rbbiyoḷ . v® . hariyaṁteṁte virāja mānatanutāti prēkṣaṇīya¨rmmahēśvaraneṁtaṁta susaṁyatāṁgata
nayōtkriṣṭasvanūpa¨rvvacōvaraneṁtaṁte saṁśōbhamāna bahulāsyaprēkṣaṇa¨rddānaśīla� naṁtaprabhumukhya muttageya mūnū¨rvva¨rssamastō
¨rbbiyoḷ . kaṁ . mūnū¨rvvaranārādhisutānaṁdadoḷeṁdu vi¨rpparī muttageyoḷ nānābyavahṛti labdhānūnadhana śvētakulada vaiśya¨rdriśyar . kaṁ . śvētakulavaiśyarū
ḷatikhyātiyutaṁ baṁmmiseṭṭiyeṁbaṁ puṇyaprītaṁ paḍedaṁ sutanūjātananā nāciseṭṭiyaṁ vaiṣṇavanaṁ . kaṁ . Ā nāciseṭṭi munnaṁ nānābratayuktanāgi bhā¨ryyāsahi
taṁ śrīnāthanana¨rccisi dhātrīsutanaṁ kaihiseṭṭiyaṁ tāṁ paḍedaṁ . v® . sativerasacyutāṁghri gaḷanāgaḷuva¨rccisi kaihiseṭṭi suk®taṁgaḷiṁ paḍedanū¨rjjita tējadanūnadānada
pratimavarēṇyapuṇyada viśālasuśīlada cauṁḍiseṭṭiyaṁ nutamati nāciseṭṭiya nanaṁtaguṇaṁgaḷa mādiseṭṭiyaṁ . [kaṁ .] muttageyanaḍuve bhaktiyinuttama viṣṇuprati
ṣṭheyaṁ māḍisi saṁpattiyaneḍeyuḍugada kulapattageyippaṁtu kaihiseṭṭiye padedaṁ . kaṁ . palakālaṁ rakṣisi nijakuladoḷ cauṁḍiseṭṭi tāne paḍedaṁ sulalitavappa suputraṁ kula
dīpaka yeṁba vākyada¨rtthavaneṁduṁ . v® . Udhrityāśu rasātaḷādvasumatīṁ yō da dhīnōdadhē rakṣōrājaśiraḥkaraṁ trijagatāṁ ka¨rttā caka¨rttācalaṁ kāḷiṁdīhrada kāḷiyō tphaṇamaṇau
cakrīḍitaḥ krīḍitaḥ sōyaṁ rakṣatu cauṁḍiseṭṭimaniśaṁ d®śyāvaḷaḥ śyāmaḷaḥ . v® . lakṣmī ¨rvakṣasi yasya kaustubharucāstē bhoṣitā bhoṣitā bhrūbhaṁgātplavagāṁghri laṁghya
makarōddēvāridhiṁ vāridhiṁ niśśēṣīkṛtavāṁ jagatraya ripūnyō dānavāndānavā nsōyaṁ rakṣatu mādiseṭṭimaniśaṁ gōpīvaraḥ pīvaraḥ . dānapriyavākyayutaṁ
jñānāvaga¨rbbhakṣamāyutaṁ śūratvaṁ mānavarellaṁ pogaḷalanūnateyiṁ mādiseṭṭiguṁṭī triguṇaṁ . kaṁ . Esadire nijajanakaṁ māḍisidī dēva¨rgge saudhaprāsādamaṁ māḍisi vṛtti
yanitta¨rccauṁḍiseṭṭiyuṁ mādiseṭṭiyuṁ muttageyoḷu . va . svasti śrīmaduttamadagra hāraṁ muttageya naḍuvaṇa dakṣiṇāmukhada śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvara pūje punaskārakkaṁ
caitrapavitrārōpaṇakkaṁ cauḍiseṭṭiyuṁ mādiseṭṭiyuṁ koṭṭa keyi nālkaneya viṭṭapa yyaṁgaḷa paṁnasinalu maṇnigavaḷḷiya dāriya cikkakeṟeyiṁ pattira mūḍalu Ākeṟeya keyiṁ
teṁkalu mūreneya pannasina dāriyiṁ pattire paḍuvalu ṭakkaḷigeya Aḍḍadāriyiṁ baḍagalu śrīraṁgasōmēśvara phaḷisāsara magaṁ kaihaṇa phaḷisāsanuṁ taṁma cikkayya
nuṁ Aṁti¨rbbara kaiyalu śrīmadu vaḍḍabyavahāri cauṁḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ nāciseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ dhāreyaṁ koṁḍu prabhumakhya mahājanaṁgaḷige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu
Avara kaiyalu Aruvaṇa bhūmiyāgi haḍadu śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvarige biṭṭakeyi mattaru hadineṁṭu Ā keyige dēvarikkuva Aruvaṇa paṇaṁ hadineṁṭu . mattaṁ
Ūroḍeya nācarasara maga cikkagōviṁdarasara kayyalavarānucchāyada guḍḍe mānya doḷage dhāregoṁḍu biṭṭa keyyi hiriya gōviṁdarasara mānyadaṁ pattire mūḍalu maṇigavaḷḷi
ya sīmeyiṁ teṁkalu hiriya kēśavadēvara mānyadiṁ pattire paḍuvalu mattaru hadināṟu . mattaṁ Ūroḍeya cikka saṁbaradēvana maga bācarasana keyyalavarānucchāyada gu
ḍḍe mānyadoḷage dhāregoṁḍu biṭṭa keyyi vimaḷēśvaradēvara mānyadiṁ baḍagalu saṁkēśvara dēvara mānyadiṁ mūḍalu bāviya haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu mattaru hadināku .
mattaṁ haṟuheya rēvimeyana kaiyalu dhāregoṁḍa mālagāṟa kanakikabbeya maga vaḍḍiyaṁṇana kaiyyalu kaihaṇa seṭṭiyaru dhāregoṁḍu śrī ceṁnakēśavadē
va¨rgge biṭṭa tōṁṭaṁ mākēśvaradēvara tōṭadaṁ pattire paḍuvalu haḷḷadiṁ baḍagalu benakana tōṁṭadiṁ mūḍalu beḷadiṁ teṁkalu kaṁbaṁ sāsara . Ī tōṁṭada baṇnigedeṟeya hammarasa
daṁḍanāyakaruṁ samastakaraṇaṁgaḷuṁ pā¨rttiva saṁvatsaradāṣāḍha ba huḷa navami budhavāra dakṣiṇāyana saṁkrāṁtiyalu paramēśvara dattiyāgiśrī ceṁnakēśavadēva¨rgga sa¨rbbanamaśyaṁ māḍi
dhārāpū¨rbbakaṁ koṭṭaru . Ī tōṁṭadaraṇi guttigatanavaṁ kaihaṇaseṭṭiyara kaiyyalā kanakikabeyaḷiya nāciseṭṭi paḍedu dēva¨rgge niccavikkuva hosa hūvina hiriya māleya sara
Ippattanālku . Ellā Ēkādasiyalikkuva daṁḍe prabhāvaḷeya duddadaranālku raṭṭavāsiga voṁdu . niccavikkuva sēveya bāḍu kāyādaḍe haṁneraḍu
Elevākuvappiḍi variṣaṁprati phalabaṁdaḍoṁdu huṇiseya meccumaranaṁ kuḍuvanu Iṁti nituvaṁ naḍasuvaṁ naḍasadi¨rddaḍaraṇiguttiganalla tānottadhureyaṁ kuḍasalla . mattaṁ
bhāṇasugēriya baḍagaṇāḷige vaḍḍadelu śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvara dēguladiṁ pattire mūḍalu nivēśana kammaṁ hattumaṁ rēcaṇaghaḷisāsara kayyalu dhāregoṁḍu
prabhumukhya mahājanaṁgaḷige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu sthānapūje beḷugoḍe bāgilujōḷa taḷāṟagūli Asatanyāya viṁtinituvaṁ sa¨rbbamānyavāgi haḍadu
dēvara pūjārigaṁ kavilegaviralu maṭhavāgi biṭṭaru . mattaṁ dēvariṁ pattire baḍagalu rāja bīdiyiṁ pattire mūḍalu caṭṭamaṭhada maneyiṁ pattire teṁkalu mana kaṁba ha
ttumaṁ kattigeya nācaṇnana viṭṭaṇnana Aṁtibbara kayyalu dhāregoṁḍu prabhumukhyamahā janaṁgaḷige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu sthānapūje beḷugoḍe bāgilajōḷa
taḷāṟagūli Asatanyāyaviṁtinituvaṁ sa¨rbbamānyavāgi paḍedu dēvara grāsenada satrakke maṭhavāgi biṭṭaru . mattaṁ cauṁḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ nāciseṭṭiyaruṁ
mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ tāvu māḍisida sabhāmaṁṭapada siddhavināyakadēvara pojenaivēdya soḍareṇne sāraṇe yiṁtinitaṁ naḍavaṁtāgi Ā sabhāmaṁṭapa
diṁ pattira teṁkalu Ūroḍeya saṁkaradēvarasara mānyada vaṭṭharadiṁ mūḍalu madhyakadaṁgaḍiya nivēśana Oṁduvaṁ prabhumukhya mahājanaṁgaḷige pāda
pūjeyaṁ koṭṭu Ūroḍeyara Aṁgaḍiya Opādiyāgi Āyasahitaṁ sa¨rbbamānyavāgi haḍadu biṭṭaru . svasti śrīmadalliya dūsiga bāciseṭṭiyaruṁ
saṇnamalliseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyara makkaḷu mūkiseṭṭiyaruṁ nāciseṭṭiyaruṁ dāvaṇa seṭṭiyara makkaḷu Ādiseṭṭiyaruṁ nāciseṭṭiyaruṁ
malliseṭṭiyaramagaṁ kāpiseṭṭiyaruṁ vijayāpurada nāgiseṭṭiyara malliseṭṭiyara magaṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ bīciseṭṭiyaruṁ saṁkharasa
yaruṁ maṁtara mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ yintivaru pramukha nakharaṁgaḷuṁ śrī ceṁnakēśava dēva¨rgge karamānyaveṁnade yellā yaṁgaḍiyalu saṭṭugaṁ jōḷavaṁ biṭṭaru . mattaṁ cauṁḍi
seṭṭiyaruṁ nāciseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ Ūroḍeya cikka saṁkharasaramaga bācarasana kayyalu haḍuvaṇa mānyagēriyalli taṁnānucchāyada mā
nyada nivēśana gaḷatigara nivēśanadiṁ pattire paḍuvalu cikka gōviṁdarasara nivēśanadiṁ pattire mūḍelu nivēśana voṁdu . mattaṁ hiriya gōviṁdarasara mānya
gēriyiṁ pattire teṁkalu karuvagēriya bīdiyiṁ pattire paḍuvalu nācarasana nivēśanadiṁ pattire baḍagalu nivēśana Eraḍu . mattaṁ cikkaviṭṭarasara mānyagēriyiṁ
teṁkalu karabhūmiyiṁ pattire mūḍalu nācarasana nivēśanadiṁ pattire baḍagalu kaṁmaṁ hattu Aṁtu nivēśanaṁ mūṟuṁ kaṁmaṁ hattumaṁ dhāragoṁḍu śrī ceṁna
kēśavadēva¨rgge koṭṭaru . mattaṁ Ūroḍeya nācarasaru karuvara kallagāvuṁḍaṁge bāyi veṁṇege koṭṭa mane haḍuvaṇa mānyagēriyalli karuvagēriya bīdiyiṁ pattire
paḍuvalu bācarasana kayyalu dhāragoṁḍa nivēśanaṁgaḷa naḍuve nivēśanavoṁdumanā kalla gāvuṁḍana kayyalu cauṁḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhava se
ṭṭiyaruṁ dhāreyaṁ koṁḍu śrī ceṁnakēśavadēva¨rgge sadbhaktiyiṁdācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyi yāgi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cauḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ hi
riya gōviṁdarasara maga bācarasana madavaḷige kōmaladēviya Anti¨rbbara kayyalavara mānyada sthaḷadoḷege haṁdarāge
ṟeya baṭṭeyiṁ pattire mūḍalu tikēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ pattire teṁkalu cikagōviṁdarasara kayyalu dhāragoṁḍa mattaru hadināṟaṟiṁ pattire paḍu
valu saḷḷakoppaliṁ baḍagalu yiha keyi mattaraydumaṁ dhāregoṁḍu śrī ceṁnakēśava dēva¨rggedhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cauṁḍiseṭṭiya
ruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ tamma maneyiṁ paḍuvalu pūjāriya maneyiṁ baḍagalu satrada maneyiṁ mūḍaliha manemāḷige sahita ka
mma hadinaydumaṁ siridēviyakkana mamma bācayyana kayyalu dhāregoṁḍu Ūraḍeya pramukhavaśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭavara keyyalu sa
¨rvva namaśyamaṁ paḍedu sadbhaktiyiṁ śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvara purāṇavaṁ pēḷva Upādhyāyari ralu dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cauṁḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭi
yaruṁ Ā siridēviyakkana taṁge hoṁniyakkana maga muddayyana kayyala beḷḷalagēriya teṁkaṇāḻige vaddada paḍuvaṇa kaḍeyalu māḷige sahita nivēśana kamma
hattumaṁ dhāragoṁḍu Ūroḍeya pramukhavaśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭavara kayyalu sa¨rbbanamaśyavāgi paḍedu śrī ceṁnakēśavadēvara sau
pa¨rṇnada taṁbulakke sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cavuḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ cikka gōviṁdarasara mamma gōviṁdadēvana kayyalu
Avarānucchāyage baṁda mūḍaṇa guḍḍe mānyadoḷage haṁdarugeṟeya baṭṭiyiṁ pattire mūḍalu maṇigavaḷḷiya sīmeyiṁ pattire teṁkalu munnaṁ
cikka gōviṁdarasara kayyalu dhāregoṁḍa keyyiṁ paḍuvalu hiriya gōviṁdarasara maga bācayyana kayyalu dhāragoṁḍa keyyiṁ pattire baḍagalu yiha
mānyada kayi mattaru yippattayeraḍumaṁ yavara keyyalu dhāregoṁḍu śrī ceṁnakēśava dēva¨rgga sadbhaktiyiṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ koṭṭaru . Ī dha¨rmmavanā
ru pratipāḷisidava¨rgge vāraṇāśi gurukṣētradalu mūvatticchāsira kavileya kōḍuvaṁ koḷagumaṁ suva¨rṇnadi kaṭṭisi mūvatti[¨r]cchāsira vēdapāraga¨rgge sū
¨ryyagrahaṇadalu dānaṁ māḍida phala . Idanānanānō¨rbbanaḷidavaṁge Ā kṣētradoḷā kavileyanābrāhmaṇarumāsū¨ryyagrahaṇadoḷaḷida pātakanakkuṁ . sāmānyō
yaṁ dha¨rmmasētu¨rnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sa¨rvvānētānbhāginaḥ pā¨rtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . bahubhi¨rvva
sudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadāphalaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhi¨rvva¨rṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 15.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
